productionCompatibleRender.backend: chromium-persistent PNG image2pipe plus H.264 encode

comparisonBoundary: The production result includes capture and software encode. The shared-surface result measures browser-to-native surface delivery only, so their throughput values are not an end-to-end speedup claim.
nextMilestone: Import each callback-scoped IOSurface into the Rust/wgpu compositor, then feed the native hardware encoder and benchmark complete video output.
